name: n8n-MCP
description: MCP bridge to n8n's 1,505 automation nodes, documentation, and 2,709 workflow templates — lets AI agents build, search, and understand n8n workflows with full context.

skills.name: Node Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve documentation for any of n8n's 1,505 automation nodes via MCP tools

skills.name: Workflow Templates
skills.description: Access 2,709 workflow templates to bootstrap n8n automations from within an AI agent session

skills.name: Workflow Building
skills.description: Help agents construct valid n8n workflow JSON with correct node configurations and connections
